title: mangifera minutifolia
intro: Mangifera minutifolia is a species of flowering plant in the family Anacardiaceae, commonly known as the small-leaf mango or East Asian mango. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Mangifera minutifolia include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often consumed as teas or used topically for skin conditions.
